data.content:
The file is generated successfully (`obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs`) but never added to the compilation. The `GenerateSampleCode` target writes the file but doesn't include it in the `Compile` item group, so Roslyn never sees it.

**Fix:** Add the generated file to `<Compile>` items within the target.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates the file `GeneratedInfo.cs` before `CoreCompile`, but it doesn't add the generated file to the `Compile` item group. The file is written to disk but the compiler doesn't know about it.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` items after writing it. I need to add an `ItemGroup` with a `Compile Include` for the generated file inside the target.

Let me add this to the target:

```xml
<ItemGroup>
  <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />


</ItemGroup>
```

This should be added after the `WriteCodeFile` task call so that the generated file is included in compilation.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

  </Target>", "new_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>"}

<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds and runs correctly now.

**Root cause:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target wrote `GeneratedInfo.cs` to disk but never told MSBuild to compile it. The compiler had no knowledge of the file.

**Fix:** Added a `<Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />` item inside the target so the generated file is included in the compilation inputs.
